summary: Plan-only assessment for five open maintainer-ready PRs. No merge action is safe from the hydrated artifact because no item has complete merge preflight proof including a clean Codex /review. Two PRs have concrete procedural or branch-repair paths; three require maintainer judgment because of broad deltas, failing checks, or active review/follow-up risk.

actions.reason: Requires maintainer judgment under broad_code_delta and compatibility/auth-provider risk before repair or merge finalization.
Likely repair path is procedural rather than a replacement PR: hydrate/resolve bot feedback, run Codex /review, rerun changed checks, then re-plan for merge if clean.
Requires maintainer judgment under broad_code_delta before deciding whether to repair the contributor branch, split the work, or replace with a narrower fix.
Repair contributor branch by rebasing/refactoring narrowly onto current main, then run required review and validation gates before re-planning merge.
Requires maintainer judgment because there is recent active review/follow-up plus a failing check; do not merge or replace without the review context.
